title: Oritrophium venezuelense
taxonomy: Oritrophium venezuelense is classified within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Oritrophium. The species is a member of the tribe Millerieae. Oritrophium venezuelense is a flowering plant native to South America. It is closely related to other species within the Oritrophium genus.
uses: Oritrophium venezuelense is a plant species native to Venezuela. Unfortunately, there is limited information available about its medicinal uses. However, some plants in the same family as Oritrophium venezuelense, such as those in the Asteraceae family, are known to have various medicinal properties. parts: Oritrophium venezuelense, a plant species found in Venezuela, has been studied for its potential medicinal properties.
